feed.title: Worship services - Trinity and Cores End URCs

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs
Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday 14th June 2026- #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Lesley Hatton Organist: Charles Brewster
00:00 - Music before the service
02:49 - Entry of the Bible
03:06 - Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
06:02 - Call to worship
06:30 - Hymn: R&S 104 Praise my Soul the King of heaven
10:07 - Opening Prayers The Lord’s Prayer
15:36 - 18:25 - Introduction to the Theme: Journeys #RaceAcrossTheWorld
18:58 - Hymn: R&S 552 The King of Love my Shepherd is
22:22 - 24:13 - Reading: Genesis 12 vv 1 – 9 read by Arthur
24:45 - 35:21 - Talk (1) Journeying in Faith
35:40 - Hymn: R&S 558 Will you come and follow me
38:06 - Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
39:30 - 41:45 - Reading: Matthew 9 vv 35 – 10 vv 15 read by Tony
42:08 - 48:52 - Talk (2) Journeying with Good News Followed by reflective music
50:31 - Hymn: R&S 474 Brother, Sister, let me serve you
53:19 - 57:55 - Prayers for others and ourselves
58:06 - 01:00:54 - Hymn: R&S 345 Guide me, O thou great Jehovah
01:00:55 - 01:01:13 - Closing blessing
01:01:39 - 01:04:41 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday 7th June 2026- #AllAreWelcome #Moderator
media:group.media:description:
Led by Stephen Burton. Organist: Angus Massie
00:00 - Music before the service
06:29 - Entry of the Bible
06:50 - Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
08:35 - Introduction and Call to worship: Psalm 60 vv 1 – 6
09:41 - HYMN R&S 121: The God of Abraham praise (tune: Leo)
14:20 - Opening Prayers
19:08 - 20:36 - Reading: Hosea 5 vv15 – 6 vv 6 read by Sue
20:56 - 28:15 - Introduction to the theme
28:31 - HYMN R&S 564: Jesus Lord we look to thee (tune: Vienna)
31:17 - 33:09 - Reading: Matthew 9 vv 9 – 13 + vv 18 – 28 read by Linda
33:39 - HYMN R&S 267: Immortal love forever full (tune: St. Columba R&S 448)
38:34 - 46:21 - Address:
46:46 - 50:59 - Prayers for others and ourselves
51:07 - Communion: all invited to share in the bread and wine (non-alcoholic grape juice) to remember Jesus.
Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
51:47 - HYMN R&S 107: The love of God comes Close (tune: Rhosymedre)
55:40 - Prayer of thanksgiving
The Lord’s Prayer (traditional words)
01:00:20 - Distribution of communion
01:05:26 - Closing Prayer
01:06:50 - HYMN R&S 560: Glorious things of thee are spoken (tune: Abbots Leigh)
01:10:16 - 01:10:37 - Blessing
01:11:52 - 01:13:46 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday 31st May 2026- #AllAreWelcome #Moderator
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Jeremy Day Organist: Angus Massie
00:00 - Music before the service
03:55 - Entry of the Bible
04:08 - Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
06:20 - Call to worship
07:27 - 10:51 - Hymn: RS 294 – Come down, O love divine
11:05 - Opening Prayers The Lord’s Prayer
14:50 - Introduction to the Bible readings
14:50 - 17:51 - Introduction to the theme
18:15 - 19:11 - Reading: Acts 2: 42-47
19:35 - Hymn: RS 295 - Breathe on Me, Breath of God
22:27 - 23:18 - Reading: John 20:19-23
23:34 - Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
24:40 - 26:04 - Hymn: RS 29 Father, We adore you (sing twice)
26:14 - 42:38 - Address followed by a time of quiet reflection
49:53 - 51:54 - Hymn: RS 308 & 309 – Spirit of the living God
51:58 - 57:05 - Prayers for others and ourselves
57:40 - 01:02:18 - Hymn: Let us build a house
01:02:19 - 01:03:04 - Closing blessing
01:03:55 - 01:05:36 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday 17th May 2026- #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Kate Yates Organist: Charles Brewster
00:00 - Music before the service
04:23 - Entry of the bible
04:40 - Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
06:02 - Call to worship
06:47 - 08:47 - Hymn 1: O breath of life, come sweeping through us (R&S 302)
08:49 - Introduction
10:14 - Opening Prayers
12:38 - The Lord’s Prayer (Contemporary English Version) Our Father in heaven, help us to honour your name. Come and set up your kingdom, so that everyone on earth will obey you, as you are obeyed in heaven. Give us our food for today. Forgive us for doing wrong, as we forgive others. Keep us from being tempted and protect us from evil. Amen.
13:21 - Hymn 2: Great is thy faithfulness (R&S 96)
17:24 - Talk: Fridah’s story
19:50 - Christian Aid video
24:20 - 25:52 - Hymn 3: The steadfast love of the Lord never ceases (sing twice) (SoF 541
26:12 - 26:44 - Readings: Luke 13.18-19 and John 14.15 read by Linda Curley
27:12 - A prayer for Christian Aid Week 2026
28:00 - Hymn 4: When I needed a neighbour (Junior Praise 275)
30:30 - Talk: Belinda's story
32:16 - 33:51 - Reading Acts 1.6-14 “You will be my witnesses” read by Linda Curley
34:18 - 44:41 - Video sermon:
44:52 - Dedication of offertory:
45:32 - 49:11 - Prayers of intercession:
49:17 - 50:48 - Talk: Faithful action – Fridah and Belinda
51:03 - 53:35 - Hymn 5: A new commandment I give unto you (R&S 745)
53:40 - 54:19 - Prayer of thanksgiving and blessing
54:20 - 54:38 - Closing blessing
54:56 - 59:46 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday 10th May 2026- #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Stephen Burton Organist: Charles Brewster
Music before the service
Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
Call to worship: Psalm 66 vv 1 – 5 Hymn: R&S 292 When morning guilds the skies Opening Prayers The Lord’s Prayer
00:42 - Introduction to the Bible readings
01:30 - 03:57 - Reading: Acts 17 vv 22 - 31 read by Sue
04:19 - 09:30 - Introduction to the theme
10:10 - 11:30 - Reading: John 14 vv 15 - 21 read by Arthur
11:59 - 14:26 - Hymn: R&S 257 The head that once was crowned with thorns
14:32 - Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
16:17 - 18:32 - Hymn: R&S 301 Holy Spirit, truth divine
19:01 - 26:16 - Address followed by a time of quiet reflection
26:39 - 29:40 - Hymn: R&S 432 Now is eternal Life
29:50 - 34:15 - Prayers for others and ourselves
34:30 - Hymn: R&S 38 Thou whose almighty word
37:01 - 37:33 - Closing blessing
38:04 - 42:25 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday 3rd May 2026- #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Led by Stephen Burton Organist: Angus Massie
00:00 - Music before the service
06:27 - Entry of Bible (please stand if you are able)
06:43 - Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
09:05 - Introduction and Call to worship Palm 31 vv 1 – 5
10:04 - 12:22 - HYMN R&S26: Father, we praise you now the night is over (tune:Christe Sanctorum)
12:27 - Opening Prayers
14:15 - 20:45 - Introduction to the theme
21:06 - 23:28 - Reading: John 14 vv 1 – 14 read by Abigail
23:49 - 27:02 - HYMN R&S 100: O love of God how strong and true (tune: Eisenach)
27:25 - 28:59 - Reading: 1 Peter 2 vv 2 - 10 read by Sarah
29:26 - 32:49 - HYMN R&S 472: Come let us join our friends above (tune: St.Matthew)
33:16 - 41:15 - Address:
41:27 - 46:23 - Prayers for others and ourselves
Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
46:42 - 50:48 - HYMN R&S 436: Dear Lord to you again our gifts we bring (tune:Yorkshire R&S 158)
50:50 - Communion: all invited to share in the bread and wine (non-alcoholic grape juice) to remember Jesus.
Prayer of thanksgiving
The Lord’s Prayer (traditional words)
55:43 - Distribution of communion
Closing Prayer
01:00:29 - HYMN R&S 405: Angel voices ever ringing (tune: Angel Voices)
01:03:08 - 01:03:37 - Blessing
01:04:22 - 01:06:10 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday 19th April 2026- #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Stephen Burton Organist: Charles Brewster
00:00 - Music before the service
07:09 - Entry of the bible
07:24 - Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
08:42 - Call to worship Psalm 116 vv 1 – 7
09:45 - Hymn: R&S 285 O for a thousand tongues to Sing (tune: Lyngham CMP 496)
14:44 - Opening Prayers 16:59 - The Lord’s Prayer
Introduction to the Bible readings
18:20 - 22:04 - Reading: Luke 24 vv 13 - 35 read by Norma
22:16 - 27:58 - Introduction to the theme
28:40 - 30:11 - Reading: Acts 2 vv 14a + 36 - 41 read by Norma
30:46 - Hymn: R&S 260 Christ is alive let Christians sing (tune: Truro)
33:19 - Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
34:34 - Hymn: R&S 364 Just as I am (tune: Saffron Walden)
38:16 - 38:35 - Prayer before the address
38:37 - 46:39 - Address followed by a time of quiet reflection
47:08 - 49:19 - Hymn: R&S 248 This joyful Eastertide (tune: Vruechten)
49:34 - 54:07 - Prayers for others and ourselves
54:27 - Hymn: R&S 432 Now is eternal life (tune: Christchurch R&S 546)
57:29 - 57:58 - Closing blessing
58:16 - 01:02:01 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Worship - Sunday 12th April 2026- #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Jeremy Day Organist: Charles Brewster
00:00 - Music before the service
04:53 - Entry of the Bible
05:28 - Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
08:03 - 08:38 - Call to worship
08:57 - Hymn: Crown him with many crowns (tune: Diademata)
12:20 - Opening Prayers
14:24 - The Lord’s Prayer
15:00 - Introduction to the Bible readings
16:08 - 17:44 - Reading: 1 Peter 1 vv 3 – 9 read by Ian
17:59 - 19:59 - Reading: John 20 vv 19 - 31 read by Lesley
20:18 - 25:35 - Introduction to the theme
26:20 - Hymn: R&S 295 Breathe on me breath of God (tune: Veni Spiritus)
28:30 - Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
29:46 - Hymn: R&S 512 Seek ye first the kingdom of God (tune: Seek ye first)
33:00 - 49:08 - Address followed by a time of quiet reflection
50:35 - 54:11 - Hymn: R&S 586 All my hope on God is founded (tune: Michael)
54:28 - 58:51 - Prayers for others and ourselves
59:10 - Hymn: R&S 260 Christ is alive let Christians sing (tune: Truro)
01:01:35 - 01:02:35 - Closing blessing
01:02:56 - 01:07:48 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Worship - Easter Day, 5th April 2026- #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Kate Yates Organist: Angus Massie
00:00 - Music before the service
07:12 - Entry of the Bible
07:27 - Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
08:51 - Introduction and Call to worship O give thanks to the Lord, for he is good; his steadfast love endures for ever! Let Israel say; his steadfast love endures for ever! Let all the Church now share; his steadfast love endures for ever! For Christ is risen! He is risen indeed! Alleluia!
09:57 - 14:26 - HYMN: R&S 232 Christ the Lord is risen today (tune: Easter Hymn)
14:29 - Opening prayers
18:03 - 19:21 - Reading: Matthew 28: 1-10 read by Linda
19:43 - HYMN: R&S 234 Alleluia, Alleluia, give thanks to the Risen Lord
23:30 - 24:10 - Reading: Colossians 3.1-4 read by Sue
24:50 - 26:03 - HYMN: R&S 583 The Church is wherever God’s people are praising
26:13 - 35:44 - Address
36:46 - Induction of Abigail Lokko as Elder
49:23 - Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
50:19 - 52:42 - HYMN: R&S 452 Let us break bread together in the Lord
52:43 - Communion: all are invited to share in the bread and wine (non-alcoholic grape juice) to remember Jesus. We will eat the bread when we receive it, remembering the gift of Jesus for us individually, and we will hold the wine and drink it together, remembering the gift of Jesus for all.
56:31 - The Lord’s Prayer (traditional words)
57:15 - Distribution of communion
01:00:56 - 01:03:16 - Post-communion prayer and prayers of intercession
01:03:24 - 01:06:29 - HYMN: R&S 262 Crown him with many crowns
01:06:37 - 01:07:08 - Blessing
01:08:02 - 01:09:58 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK #Zambia

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday, 29th March 2026- #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Kate Yates with Caroline Wharrad of Compassion UK Organist: Charles Brewster
00:00 - Music before the service
04:58 - Entry of the Bible
05:14 - Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
07:47 - Call to worship: Psalm 118 vv 26 – 29
08:30 - The Blessing of the Palms
09:38 - Hymn: R&S 208 All glory, laud and honour (tune: St Theodulph)
12:23 - Opening Prayers The Lord’s Prayer
16:30 - Introduction to the Bible readings
16:50 - 18:59 - Reading: Matthew 21 vv 1 – 11 read by Harri
19:11 - 24:09 - Introduction to the theme
24:58 - 26:19 - Reading: Philippians 5 vv 5 - 11 read by Harri
26:47 - Hymn: R&S 209 Ride on Ride on in majesty (tune: Winchester New)
28:50 - Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
30:11 - Hymn: R&S 216 As royal banners are unfurled (tune: Gonfalon Royal)
34:29 - 42:23 - Address followed by a time of quiet reflection
42:45 - Hymn: R&S 95 God is love let heaven adore him (tune: Blaenwern)
46:28 - 49:50 - Prayers for others and ourselves
50:07 - Hymn: R&S 224 In the cross of Christ I glory (tune: All for Jesus)
52:03 - 52:29 - Closing blessing
53:28 - 54:35 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK #Zambia

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday, 22nd March 2026- #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Kate Yates with Caroline Wharrad of Compassion UK Organist: Charles Brewster
00:00 - Music before the service
04:21 - Entry of the bible
04:38 - Welcome and lighting of the peace candle
06:04 - Call to worship: This is the day that the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it. This is none other than the house of God, and this is the gate of heaven. Let us come before our God with repentant and thankful hearts, trusting in God’s abundant mercy and constant love. Amen, Amen.
06:47 - Hymn 1: Give thanks with a grateful heart (Songs of Fellowship 124)
10:08 - Opening prayers of approach, confession and assurance of pardon
12:13 - The Lord’s Prayer (modern version): Our Father in heaven, hallowed be your name, your kingdom come, your will be done, on earth as in heaven. Give us today our daily bread. Forgive us our sins as we forgive those who sin against us. Save us from the time of trial and deliver us from evil. For the kingdom, the power, and the glory are yours now and for ever. Amen.
12:50 - Introduction to the Bible readings
13:20 - 14:47 - Reading: Isaiah 58.6-12 (NIV) read by Linda Curley
15:04 - Hymn 2: Christ, be our Light (Mission Praise 1201)
19:31 - 21:34 - Reading: Matthew 25.31-46 (NIV) read by Linda Curley
21:52 - Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
22:26 - Hymn 3: When I needed a neighbour (Junior Praise 275)
25:11 - 52:00 - Talk and videos: Caroline Wharrad of Compassion UK
52:24 - 54:46 - Hymn 4: Abba Father, let me be (Complete Mission Praise #3)
54:51 - 59:46 - Prayers for others and ourselves led by Kate Yates
01:00:00 - Hymn 5: Shine, Jesus, Shine (Complete Mission Praise 445)
01:04:28 - 01:04:47 - Closing blessing
01:05:10 - 01:08:56 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK #Zambia

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday, 8th March 2026- #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Stephen Burton
00:00 - Music before the service
01:54 - Entry of the bible
04:40 - Call to worship: Psalm 95 vv 1 – 7
05:43 - Hymn: R&S 405 Angel voices ever singing (tune: Angel Voices)
08:22 - Opening Prayers The Lord’s Prayer
12:01 - Introduction to the Bible readings
12:44 - 14:28 - Reading: Exodus 17 vv 1- 7 Read by Norma
14:43 - 19:26 - Introduction to the theme
19:53 - 24:46 - Reading: John 4 vv 5 – 42 Read by Sarah
25:11 - 27:44 - Hymn: R&S 689 As pants the heart for cooling streams (tune: Martyrdom)
27:47 - Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
28:43 - 31:55 - Hymn: R&S 349 I heard the voice of Jesus say (tune: Kingsfold)
32:19 - 41:28 - Address followed by a time of quiet reflection
41:46 - 45:48 - Hymn: R&S 332 Jesus lover of my soul (tune: Aberystwyth)
45:53 - 49:59 - Prayers for others and ourselves
50:17 - 53:41 - Hymn: R&S 560 Glorious things of thee are spoken (tune: Abbots Leigh)
53:41 - 54:00 - Closing blessing
54:19 - 57:58 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday, 1st March 2026- #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Our worship will commence a little later than our regular time to allow for a church meeting prior to our service.
Worship led by Stephen Burton
Music before the service
12:20 - Entry of the bible
12:21 - Welcome and lighting of the peace candle
12:52 - Introduction and Call to worship: Psalm 121 vv1 – 8
14:19 - HYMN 339: Great God your love has called us here (tune: Abingdon)
18:51 - Opening Prayers
20:40 - 22:51 - Reading: John 3 vv 1 – 17 read by Linda
23:17 - 25:05 - Reading: Romans 4 vv 1 – 5 + 13 - 17 read by Lesley 25:09 - 25:18 - May the Lord add his blessings
25:38 - 28:26 - Prayers for others and ourselves
28:27 - Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
29:23 - 32:21 - HYMN: Lamb of God unblemished (tune: Caswell (Bemerton))
32:54 - Communion: all invited to share in the bread and wine (non-alcoholic grape juice) to remember Jesus.
34:54 - Prayer of thanksgiving
36:23 - The Lord’s Prayer (traditional words)
37:02 - Distribution of communion
40:58 - Closing Prayer
42:23 - HYMN: Love divine all loves excelling (tune: Hyfrydol)
45:50 - 46:05 - Blessing
46:22 - 48:15 - Music after the service 46:52 Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK #Zambia

entry.title: Morning Worship - Sunday, 22nd February 2026 - Revd Dr Jane Kaluba - #AllAreWelcome

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday, 22nd February 2026 - Revd Dr Jane Kaluba - #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Revd Dr Jane Kaluba
00:00 - Music before the service
07:38 - Entry of the bible
07:52 - Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
12:33 - Call to Worship: Psalm 32
14:49 - 18:25 - Hymn: O Worship the King all glorious above (R&S 47)
18:34 - Prayers of Approach and Confession and Lord’s Prayer
22:51 - 25:09 - First Reading: Romans 5:12-19 read by Johnny Graves (Chesham)
25:20 - 30:41 - Talk for all ages (followed by Prayer) 30:48 - Dear God, help us do what Jesus did. Help us do what the Bible tells us to do instead of listening to what the devil wants us to do. In Jesus’ name. Amen.
31:28 - Hymn: Amazing Grace How Sweet the Sound (R & S 92)
35:34 - Blessing the Junior Church for their activities: May the Lord bless you, And also with you. Amen.
36:11 - Dedication of Offering
38:01 - 40:01 - Second Reading: Mathew 4:1-11 read by Marie Willingham (Cores End)
40:31 - 01:08:45 - Sermon - Jesus' temptation
01:09:35 - Hymn: Seek ye first the Kingdom of God (R & S 512)
01:12:37 - 01:19:16 - Prayers of Intercession Response: Lord in your mercy, Hear our prayer
01:19:34 - 01:22:09 - Hymn: What a friend we have in Jesus (R &S 413)
01:22:14 - 01:22:57 - Blessing
01:23:25 - 01:28:09 - Music after the service
Church Copyright Licence: 36750 Streaming Plus Licence: 133445 Music Reproduction Licence: 36750 Church Video Licence: 1294601 PPL Church Licence: 1824088 CLA Church Licence: 953431 PRS for Music Church Licence: 953424 OneLicense: 741270-A
@URCUK #Zambia

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Morning Worship - Sunday, 15th February 2026 - #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Worship led by Kate Yates Organist: Charles Brewster
01:42 - Entry of the bible
01:52 - Welcome and lighting of peace candle (Duty Elder)
03:06 - Call to worship: Ps 34 1 – 3 From Psalm 34 – please respond with the words in bold I will extol the LORD at all times; his praise will always be on my lips. I will glory in the LORD; let the afflicted hear and rejoice. Glorify the LORD with me; let us exalt his name together.
03:48 - Hymn R&S 74 Praise to the Lord, the Almighty, the King of Creation
07:08 - Opening Prayers and the Lord’s Prayer
09:21 - Introduction to the theme
10:49 - 11:21 - Reading: 2 Samuel 22:3-4 Contemporary English Version read by Abigail Lokko
11:36 - 14:29 - Reading: Luke 10.25-37 Contemporary English Version read by Alan Yates
14:45 - Hymn: Junior Praise 275 When I needed a neighbour
17:27 - Dedication of gifts, money, talents, time
18:13 - 29:32 - Address “Not my concern” followed by a time of quiet reflection
29:45 - Hymn R&S 474 Brother, sister let me serve you
32:35 - 38:24 - Prayers for ourselves and others
38:39 - Hymn: R&S 200 The kingdom of god is justice and joy
41:22 - 41:46 - Blessing
42:12 - 45:25 - Music after the service
